name: Jitesh Sharma
profileSummary: Jitesh Mohan Sharma is an Indian international cricketer who plays as a wicket-keeper-batter. He represents Vidarbha in domestic cricket and Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the Indian Premier League. Jitesh was a member of the Indian team that won the 2025 Asia Cup and medalled gold at the 2022 Asian Games.
